name: Eagle Info Solutions SMC Limited
location: Shop L28, 1st Floor, Nalubega Complex, Kampala, Uganda (Opp Watoto Church, Bombo Road)
profile: Eagle Info Solutions SMC Limited is a leading ICT and device solutions company based in Kampala, Uganda. They specialize in ACMT-certified Apple repairs, genuine Apple and Windows device sales, comprehensive ICT support, network infrastructure, power and backup solutions, and software licensing. The company serves homes, SMEs, NGOs, and institutions across Uganda, offering end-to-end institutional procurement including RFQ/RFP/ITB responses, compliance documentation, delivery, and after-sales support. They are ACMT (Apple Certified Macintosh Technician) certified, offer 24/7 technical support, and have a 4.9 Google rating from 21+ verified reviews. Their team includes George Bwambale (Director/CEO & Chief Technical Lead), Rest Mbambu (Administrator & Accounts Assistant), Kakande Karim Kawooya (Field Operations Lead), and Pollar Brian (Full-Stack Developer). They also develop digital platforms such as Eagle Stays (accommodation booking), MRMS (repair management), and Flowly (business automation).
